title: Rewrite all 20 scene_expansion_items lists
description: Rewrite every fourth-pool list inside Game content extraction/data/blind_boxes.py so all 20 scene_expansion_items collections become medium-scale scene fragments. Preserve scene IDs, scene names, four-pool keys, 50 unique UTF-8 strings per pool, and the derived BLIND_BOXES plus BLIND_BOX_COMPATIBILITY_MAPPING contract.
acceptance_criteria: 20 scene_expansion_items lists are rewritten in place for all 20 scene bundles in BLIND_BOX_ITEM_POOL_BUNDLES.
Each rewritten list still contains exactly 50 unique UTF-8 strings, and 0 scene IDs, scene names, or pool keys are added, removed, or renamed.

0 fourth-pool entries remain as oversized furniture/storage subjects such as cabinets, carts, racks, shelves, desks, counters, booths, wardrobes, or their Chinese equivalents unless IMPL-1 marked an explicit allowed exception.

0 fourth-pool entries remain as standalone tiny information subjects such as cards, labels, tickets, bookmarks, price tags, or stickers unless IMPL-1 marked them as upgraded larger information surfaces.
verification: python -B -m unittest discover -s 'Game content extraction' -p 'test_*.py'  # after the rewrite, remaining failures should only reflect unfinished IMPL-3 assertions

produces: One complete source rewrite of all 20 fourth-pool lists
No runtime-shape changes outside the rewritten scene_expansion_items content
ready_for: IMPL-3 can finalize and execute the regression suite against the completed data rewrite
